fragment:
<set-variable name="kc_sub" value="@{
        if (!context.Request.Url.Path.Contains("/realms/srtp/")
            || !context.Request.Url.Path.Contains("/token")
            || context.Response.StatusCode != 200) {
            return "";
        }
        var body = context.Response.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
        string accessToken = body["access_token"]?.ToString();
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(accessToken)) { return "unknown"; }
        var parts = accessToken.Split('.');
        if (parts.Length < 2) { return "unknown"; }
        var payload = parts[1].PadRight(parts[1].Length + (4 - parts[1].Length % 4) % 4, '=');
        var json = JObject.Parse(System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(Convert.FromBase64String(payload)));
        return json["sub"]?.ToString() ?? "unknown";
    }" />
    
        
            
                @((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("kc_client_id", "unknown"))
